name: codex-claude-bridge
description: Wraps OpenAI Codex (GPT-5.4-class) inside Claude Code as an adversarial reviewer, execution rescue tool, parallel delegation surface, and Codex-methods skill suite. Seven slash commands — /codex:setup, /codex:status, /codex:rescue, and two review pairs split by scope: /codex:diff-review and /codex:adversarial-diff-review run against a git diff; /codex:review and /codex:adversarial-review run against arbitrary files or folders. Plus five agentic skills: implement-with-codex (parallel delegation), adversarial-plan-review (Kashef planning loop with 6 locked categories), browser-verify (Playwright MCP / @browseruse / Codex Chrome plugin verification), failure-as-knowledge (deduped AGENTS.md error log), and agents-md-sync (lean AGENTS.md ↔ CLAUDE.md sync). Hard-coded 7-attack-surface taxonomy and structured-JSON output for closed-loop plan-mode integration.
